steps.title: Use the zero product property
steps.content:
A product equals $0$ when at least one of its factors equals $0$. Set each factor equal to $0$.
$$x=0$$
$$x-2=0$$
$$x+5=0$$

steps.title: List the solutions
steps.content:
Solve the three simple equations.
$$x=0$$
$$x=2$$
$$x=-5$$
One listed solution is $0$. The answer is B.
